name: Foreign Expropriation Loss Recovery Election

eligibility.description: Available to domestic corporations subject to tax under section 11 or 801 that sustained a foreign expropriation loss and later recovered money or property related to that loss.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows domestic corporations to elect a specific tax treatment for the recovery of property previously seized by a foreign government, potentially excluding the recovery from current gross income in favor of a tax increase calculation based on prior year benefits.
